detail: Confirmed DCS380-4 by exact Sd (819.4 cm²) and Xmax (8.4 mm) match — physical dimensions that do not vary. T/S params differ from datasheet (e.g. Fs 22.8 vs 21.5 Hz, Qms 3.46 vs 3.79, SPL 89.1 vs 93.6 dB) due to community measurement: break-in softens the suspension shifting Fs/Qms, and different measurement tools (DATS, Woofer Tester, LIMP) extract different values from the same impedance curve. Brand field was corrected from 'Dayton Classic 15"' to 'Dayton Audio'.
